education.institution: AMA Computer College San Fernando, La Union

projects.title: Himaya
projects.description: A high-fidelity Figma UI/UX design project for a premium makeup shopping website, featuring clean layouts and an elegant cosmetic aesthetic.

projects.title: Coffee Shop Website
projects.description: A responsive landing page layout designed for a modern cafe, showcasing menus, contact options, and a warm visual design.

projects.title: Simple Calculator
projects.description: A clean, functional calculator web application capable of performing standard mathematical operations smoothly.

projects.title: Utang List
projects.description: A simple tracking application designed to organize, calculate, and log personal lendings, debts, and balances.

projects.title: Grade Calculator
projects.description: A useful calculator tool built to help students input scores, weightings, and quickly evaluate their academic averages.

projects.title: Wedding Invitation
projects.description: An elegant, digital wedding invitation website complete with RSVP features, event timelines, and venue maps.

projects.title: Hangman Game
projects.description: A terminal-based word-guessing game designed using direct text outputs to handle guesses and display win/loss states.

projects.title: Rock Paper Scissors Game
projects.description: A terminal-based classic game featuring randomized computer choices and live scorekeeping for the user.
